title: Beauty and the Boy
overview: Touta is upset at his inability to control magic when all of his friends can. Meanwhile, Yukihime is attacked by a bounty hunter. Is Touta able to come to her aid?

title: You Can't Hate Someone You Meet Naked
overview: A new world is waiting for Touta and Yukihime, but outside of the quiet countryside, something dark is lurking. Meanwhile, has Touta made a new ally? Or a new enemy?

title: Palace of the Immortals
overview: Touta, Kuroumaru, and Yukihime are off to the capital and the secret headquarters of the UQ Holders. What lessons will be learned there?

title: Invasion of the Assassins
overview: Touta gets his first assignment from Yukihime which is the perfect job for beginners but things do not go as they were planned.

title: Magia Erebea
overview: Touta, Kuroumaru, and Karin are rendered helpless in the fight against the immortal hunters. When things seem hopeless, help comes from the most unlikely source.

title: Kuroumaru's Dark Days
overview: The gang learns something about Kuroumaru that must be kept secret from Touta. Meanwhile, they find trouble while they are out on the town.

title: Reset and Restart
overview: After Touta is on his date with Kuroumaru, he meets Kirie in the city but she does something that he doesn't expect which sets off a series of interesting events.

title: Operation: Capture Fate
overview: The story of Touta's grandad unfolds as his past seems to be shrouded by mystery. But will Touta's questions be answered?

title: Love, Baths, and Vigorous Exercise
overview: A surprising rivalry of love between the girls ensues, as Touta uncovers more about his cryptic grandfather's past.

title: Welcome to Mahora Academy
overview: Touta's lackluster mood rapidly sharpens when he enters the Mahora Academy.

title: Her Love Story
overview: Yukihime unravels her stories of her fruitful past, while Touta is entrapped in another world where his only power is his mind.

title: Adeat! Everlasting Love
overview: The time has come for Touta to make his ever lasting decision but will it be the right choice?
